meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code skills setup to overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: You don't need to learn syntax to ship a SaaS. By leveraging Claude Code as your autonomous lead developer and Antigravity as your architectural blueprint, you bypass the learning curve. Simply define your business logic, execute via CLI, and iterate on functional code rather than wrestling with low-level implementation details.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with founders who spent six months learning React instead of talking to customers. You are not a developer; you are an architect. The gap between your vision and a live product is no longer a code barrier—it is a translation barrier.

Today, we bridge that gap. By treating Claude Code as a senior engineer and using Antigravity to structure your intent, you transform from a non-technical founder into a product-shipment machine. This guide strips away the academic fluff and focuses on one thing: turning your business logic into production-ready software.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use Antigravity to map your data models and user flow. This prevents scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a high-level technical architecture for a SaaS platform that solves [Insert Problem]. Focus on modular, scalable components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project structure based on this architectural blueprint: [Paste Antigravity Output]'

steps.title: Initialize the Repository
steps.description: Set up your environment so Claude Code can read and write files directly within your project workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the terminal commands to initialize a standard Node.js or Python repository for a scalable web application.

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'Unique Value Proposition' feature. Use Claude to write the core service layer, not the boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for [Feature Name] focusing on clean code, error handling, and performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the core service layer for [Feature Name] using the previously defined architecture'

steps.title: Integrate Database Schema
steps.description: Ensure your database interactions are secure and efficient. Let Claude handle the ORM setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for user profiles and subscriptions that integrates with Prisma or SQLAlchemy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply this schema and create the necessary migration files: [Paste Schema]'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Debugging
steps.description: Never ship untested code. Use Claude to write unit tests for every critical function you've built.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Jest/PyTest tests for the core logic implemented in step 3. Focus on edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write and execute tests for all new modules. Fix any failures automatically.'

pro_tips: Always use the 'chat' mode in Claude Code to iterate on specific functions rather than regenerating the entire codebase.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'System Instructions'—keep them updated as your product requirements evolve.
Force Claude Code to explain its architectural decisions before it writes code to catch logic errors early.
Use version control branching strictly; if Claude makes a mistake, revert the commit before asking for a fix.
Focus on shipping the MVP in under 7 days; if a feature takes longer, simplify the scope rather than fighting technical debt.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to a cloud provider like Vercel or Railway, then immediately begin A/B testing your landing page with real users.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same tools as elite software teams. Stop waiting for a technical co-founder and start building your legacy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
